title: philadelphia fed / inflation expectations / pies survey | Economic Commentary | Price and Inflation Expectations Survey (PIES) - 2026 Q1 Rep...
summary: Philadelphia Fed's Q1 2026 Price and Inflation Expectations Survey (PIES) shows Third District firms expect their own prices to rise 3.1% over the next four quarters, up from 2.6% in Q4 2025, while median U.S. inflation expectations held steady at 3.0% and mean expectations remained at 3.6%. Long-run median inflation expectations declined to 3.0% from 4.0%, though the mean rose to 7.4% from 6.0%, indicating significant dispersion in longer-term views.
